article.headline: High Point 78, VMI 57
article.story: HIGH POINT, N.C. (AP) -- Danny Gathings scored 23 points and grabbed 11 rebounds to lead High Point to a 78-57 win over Virginia Military Institute on Wednesday night. Gathings was the only player to score in the double-digits for the Panthers (11-5, 4-1 Big South Conference), who led 35-24 at the half. Radee Skipworth led the Keydets (3-11, 1-3) with 20 points and four rebounds. Also scoring double-digits for VMI were Matt Coward with 15 and Matt Murrer with 13. Coward also had seven assists. Each team turned the ball over 22 times.
